prompt: Migrate all components in the folder C:\Users\<user>\.claude\skills\shadcn-component-migrator-workspace\iteration-1\eval-simple-components\test-components to shadcn/ui equivalents. Ensure the public API is preserved and responsive classes survive.

assertions.name: custom-badge-uses-shadcn-badge

assertions.name: custom-separator-uses-shadcn-separator

assertions.name: props-interface-preserved
assertions.description: All migrated components should preserve their original props interfaces

assertions.name: no-custom-css-duplication
